few_shot_examples.question: What is total revenue by region?
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

few_shot_examples.question: How many employees are in each department?
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON d.id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY employee_count DESC;

few_shot_examples.question: Average salary by department
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT d.name, AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON d.id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.name;

few_shot_examples.question: Total sales by department
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT d.name, SUM(s.amount) AS total_sales FROM sales s JOIN employees e ON e.id = s.employee_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.name;

few_shot_examples.question: Employee count by department
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON d.id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.name;

few_shot_examples.question: Total sales by channel
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT channel, SUM(amount) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY channel;

few_shot_examples.question: Average sale amount by channel
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT channel, AVG(amount) AS avg_sale FROM sales GROUP BY channel;

few_shot_examples.question: List sales in EMEA
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT id, amount, sale_date FROM sales WHERE region = 'EMEA';

few_shot_examples.question: Show sales through direct channel
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT id, amount, sale_date FROM sales WHERE channel = 'Direct';

few_shot_examples.question: Employees hired in 2022
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT id, first_name, last_name FROM employees WHERE hired_at >= '2022-01-01' AND hired_at < '2023-01-01';

few_shot_examples.question: Top region by total sales
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;

few_shot_examples.question: Department with highest total sales
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT d.name, SUM(s.amount) AS total_sales FROM sales s JOIN employees e ON e.id = s.employee_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;

few_shot_examples.question: Latest sale date
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT MAX(sale_date) AS latest_sale_date FROM sales;
